title: The Arcane Symposium
description: Use all the evidence to deduce the mixing results.

hints.text: To find the result of mixing ing4 and ing7, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing4=R+ (ing4+ing8=R+: both share R+), ing7=R+ (ing7 has R+; ing5+ing7=neutral → ing5 has R-; ing5+ing7=neutral → ing7 has R+)
      → SAME sign + → R+ resolves.

To find the result of mixing ing7 and ing8, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing7=R+ (ing7 has R+; ing5+ing7=neutral → ing5 has R-; ing5+ing7=neutral → ing7 has R+), ing8=R+ (ing4+ing8=R+: both share R+)
      → SAME sign + → R+ resolves.

To find the result of mixing ing3 and ing4, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing3=R- (ing2+ing3=R-: both share R-), ing4=R+ (ing4+ing8=R+: both share R+)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  G: ing3=G+ (ing1+ing3=G+: both share G+), ing4=G- (ing4 has G-)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  B: ing3=B- (ing3 has B-), ing4=B+ (ing2+ing4=B+: both share B+)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  All colours opposite → neutral.
